headline: Nucor (NUE) Ascends But Remains Behind Market: Some Facts to Note
summary: In the most recent trading session, Nucor (NUE) closed at $169.1, indicating a +2.64% shift from the previous trading day.

headline: Is Nucor Corporation (NUE) One of the Best Stocks to Invest in for Good Returns?
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is one of the best stocks to invest in for good returns. On March 25, KeyBanc initiated coverage of Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE)) with a Sector Weight rating. The rating comes on the heels of the company announcing that it expects first-quarter earnings to be in the range of $2.70 to $2.80 per […]

headline: Shares of base metal-related stocks are trading higher amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which damaged production facilities and disrupted supplies. Declining output in key Chilean mines may raise investor concerns about broader supply constraints.
